title: gastrodia maliauensis
intro: Gastrodia maliauensis, a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Maliau Basin in Sabah, Malaysia, is a type of flowering plant known for its unique medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gastrodia maliauensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the roots are boiled in water to extract its medicinal compounds, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine.
